title: Elytrigia antarctica
taxonomy: Elytrigia antarctica is classified as a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Elytrigia, which is a group of cool-season grasses. The species is further classified as Elytrigia antarctica, a name that reflects its Antarctic origin. This classification places it within the order Poales, which includes many types of grasses and sedges. The specific classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of this unique plant.
uses: Elytrigia antarctica, also known as Antarctic hair grass, has been found to have potential medicinal properties, although further research is required to confirm its effectiveness.
